characters.name: Jesus
characters.description: The Son of God, Messiah, and central figure of Christianity

appearances.text: The book of the generation of Jesus Christ
Then cometh Jesus from Galilee to Jordan
Jesus came from Nazareth of Galilee
His name was called JESUS
Grace and truth came by Jesus Christ
All that Jesus began both to do and teach

characters.name: Moses
characters.description: Prophet and leader who led the Israelites out of Egypt
facts: Author of the first five books of the Bible

appearances.text: She called his name Moses
God called unto him out of the bush, Moses, Moses
God spake all these words to Moses
Moses was very meek
So Moses the servant of the LORD died

characters.name: David
characters.description: Second king of Israel, warrior, and psalmist

appearances.text: Samuel anointed David in the midst of his brethren
David said to the Philistine, I come to thee in the name of the LORD
They anointed David king over Israel
So David slept with his fathers
A Psalm of David. The LORD is my shepherd

characters.name: Abraham
characters.description: Father of the Hebrew people and friend of God
facts: Called by God to leave his homeland

appearances.text: The LORD had said unto Abram, Get thee out of thy country
Thy name shall be Abraham
God did tempt Abraham
Abraham believed God
By faith Abraham obeyed

characters.name: Paul
characters.description: Apostle to the Gentiles and author of many New Testament letters
facts: Converted on the road to Damascus
Wrote 13 epistles in the New Testament

appearances.text: Saul, Saul, why persecutest thou me?
Saul, who also is called Paul
Paul, a servant of Jesus Christ
Paul, called to be an apostle
Paul, an apostle

characters.name: Mary
characters.description: Mother of Jesus Christ

appearances.text: Joseph, the husband of Mary, of whom was born Jesus
To a virgin espoused to a man named Joseph; and the virgin's name was Mary
The angel said unto her, Fear not, Mary
To be taxed with Mary his espoused wife
There stood by the cross of Jesus his mother

characters.name: Adam
characters.description: The first human created by God
facts: First man in the Garden of Eden

appearances.text: The LORD God formed man of the dust of the ground
Adam gave names to all cattle
Unto Adam he said, Because thou hast hearkened
This is the book of the generations of Adam
Death reigned from Adam to Moses

characters.name: Eve
characters.description: The first woman, wife of Adam
facts: First woman in the Garden of Eden

appearances.text: The serpent said unto the woman
The woman saw that the tree was good for food
Adam called his wife's name Eve
Adam knew Eve his wife
As the serpent beguiled Eve

characters.name: Noah
characters.description: Righteous man who built the ark and survived the flood
facts: Built the ark as commanded by God
Saved his family and animals from the flood
Father of Shem, Ham, and Japheth

appearances.text: Noah found grace in the eyes of the LORD
Noah was a just man and perfect
The LORD said unto Noah, Come thou and all thy house into the ark
God blessed Noah and his sons
By faith Noah prepared an ark

characters.name: Peter
characters.description: Chief apostle and leader of the early church

appearances.text: Simon Peter answered, Thou art the Christ
Thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church
The Lord turned, and looked upon Peter
Jesus saith to Simon Peter, lovest thou me?
Peter, standing up with the eleven

characters.name: John
characters.description: Beloved disciple and author of the Gospel of John
facts: Wrote Gospel of John, three epistles, and Revelation
Known as the disciple whom Jesus loved

appearances.text: James the son of Zebedee, and John his brother
James and John, he surnamed them Boanerges
There was leaning on Jesus' bosom one of his disciples, whom Jesus loved
Peter and John went up together into the temple
The Revelation of Jesus Christ, which he gave unto John

characters.name: Sarah
characters.description: Wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac
facts: Gave birth to Isaac at age 90
Known for her faith and beauty

appearances.text: Thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be
Sarah laughed within herself
Sarah conceived, and bare Abraham a son
Look unto Abraham and unto Sarah
Through faith also Sara received strength

characters.name: Isaac
characters.description: Son of Abraham and Sarah, father of Jacob and Esau

appearances.text: Abraham called the name of his son Isaac
Take now thy son, thine only son Isaac
Isaac brought her into his mother Sarah's tent

characters.name: Jacob
characters.description: Son of Isaac, father of the twelve tribes of Israel

appearances.text: His name was called Jacob
Thy name shall be called no more Jacob, but Israel

characters.name: Joseph
characters.description: Son of Jacob who became vizier of Egypt
facts: Sold into slavery by his brothers
Wore the coat of many colors

appearances.text: Israel loved Joseph more than all his children
Pharaoh said unto Joseph, I have set thee over all the land of Egypt

characters.name: Joshua
characters.description: Moses' successor who led Israel into the Promised Land

appearances.text: The LORD spake unto Joshua the son of Nun
The LORD was with Joshua

characters.name: Samson
characters.description: Judge of Israel known for supernatural strength
facts: Killed a lion with his bare hands

appearances.text: The woman bare a son, and called his name Samson
Samson said, Let me die with the Philistines

characters.name: Ruth
characters.description: Moabite woman who became ancestor of David
facts: Said 'thy people shall be my people'

appearances.text: Ruth said, whither thou goest, I will go
Boaz took Ruth, and she was his wife

characters.name: Samuel
characters.description: Prophet and last judge of Israel
facts: Dedicated to God as a child
Anointed both Saul and David as kings
Heard God's voice as a boy

appearances.text: The LORD called Samuel
Samuel took the horn of oil, and anointed David

characters.name: Saul
characters.description: First king of Israel

appearances.text: Samuel took a vial of oil, and poured it upon Saul's head
The LORD hath rejected thee from being king

characters.name: Solomon
characters.description: Third king of Israel, known for wisdom
facts: Wrote Proverbs, Ecclesiastes, Song of Solomon

appearances.text: I have given thee a wise and understanding heart
Solomon began to build the house of the LORD

characters.name: Elijah
characters.description: Prophet who challenged Baal worship
facts: Taken to heaven in a whirlwind

appearances.text: Elijah the Tishbite said unto Ahab
Elijah went up by a whirlwind into heaven

characters.name: Elisha
characters.description: Prophet and successor to Elijah
facts: Received double portion of Elijah's spirit

appearances.text: Elisha said, Let a double portion of thy spirit be upon me
Naaman went down, and dipped himself seven times in Jordan

characters.name: Isaiah
characters.description: Major prophet who prophesied about the Messiah

appearances.text: I heard the voice of the Lord, saying, Whom shall I send?
He was wounded for our transgressions

characters.name: Jeremiah
characters.description: The weeping prophet of Judah

appearances.text: Before I formed thee in the belly I knew thee
They cast Jeremiah into the dungeon

characters.name: Ezekiel
characters.description: Prophet during Babylonian captivity
facts: Saw the valley of dry bones

appearances.text: The heavens were opened, and I saw visions of God
He brought me out in the spirit, and set me down in the midst of the valley

characters.name: Daniel
characters.description: Prophet in Babylon, interpreter of dreams

appearances.text: Then was the secret revealed unto Daniel
My God hath sent his angel, and hath shut the lions' mouths

characters.name: Jonah
characters.description: Prophet who was swallowed by a great fish
facts: Swallowed by fish for three days

appearances.text: The LORD had prepared a great fish to swallow up Jonah
The people of Nineveh believed God

characters.name: Esther
characters.description: Jewish queen who saved her people
facts: Risked her life to save Jews

appearances.text: The king loved Esther above all the women
If I perish, I perish

characters.name: Job
characters.description: Righteous man who suffered great trials

appearances.text: There was a man whose name was Job, and that man was perfect
The LORD blessed the latter end of Job more than his beginning

characters.name: Nehemiah
characters.description: Rebuilt the walls of Jerusalem

appearances.text: Send me unto Judah, that I may build it
The wall was finished

characters.name: Ezra
characters.description: Priest and scribe who restored Torah observance
facts: Read the Law to the people

appearances.text: Ezra had prepared his heart to seek the law of the LORD
They spake unto Ezra the scribe to bring the book of the law

characters.name: Deborah
characters.description: Judge and prophetess of Israel

appearances.text: Deborah, a prophetess, she judged Israel at that time
Then sang Deborah

characters.name: Gideon
characters.description: Judge who defeated Midianites with 300 men

appearances.text: The angel of the LORD appeared unto him, The LORD is with thee
By the three hundred men will I save you

characters.name: Bathsheba
characters.description: Wife of David, mother of Solomon

appearances.text: Is not this Bathsheba, the daughter of Eliam?
Bathsheba bowed, and did reverence unto the king

characters.name: Naomi
characters.description: Mother-in-law of Ruth

appearances.text: Call me not Naomi, call me Mara
Naomi took the child, and laid it in her bosom

characters.name: Hannah
characters.description: Mother of Samuel the prophet

appearances.text: Hannah conceived, and bare a son, and called his name Samuel
Hannah prayed, and said, My heart rejoiceth in the LORD

characters.name: Goliath
characters.description: Philistine giant defeated by David

appearances.text: There went out a champion named Goliath, whose height was six cubits
David smote the Philistine in his forehead

characters.name: Jonathan
characters.description: Son of Saul and friend of David
facts: Died in battle with his father

appearances.text: The soul of Jonathan was knit with the soul of David
Jonathan caused David to swear, because he loved him

characters.name: Jezebel
characters.description: Evil queen who promoted Baal worship

appearances.text: Jezebel sent a messenger unto Elijah
They threw Jezebel down

characters.name: Hezekiah
characters.description: Righteous king of Judah

appearances.text: Hezekiah trusted in the LORD God of Israel
I will add unto thy days fifteen years

characters.name: Josiah
characters.description: Boy king who reformed Judah

appearances.text: Josiah was eight years old when he began to reign
Like unto him was there no king before him

characters.name: Cain
characters.description: First son of Adam, who murdered Abel

appearances.text: She conceived, and bare Cain
Cain rose up against Abel his brother, and slew him

characters.name: Abel
characters.description: Second son of Adam, first martyr

appearances.text: She again bare his brother Abel
By faith Abel offered unto God a more excellent sacrifice

characters.name: Enoch
characters.description: Man who walked with God and did not die

appearances.text: Enoch walked with God: and he was not; for God took him
By faith Enoch was translated that he should not see death

characters.name: Lot
characters.description: Nephew of Abraham who escaped Sodom

appearances.text: Lot dwelled in the cities of the plain
His wife looked back from behind him, and she became a pillar of salt

characters.name: Rebekah
characters.description: Wife of Isaac, mother of Jacob and Esau

appearances.text: Isaac brought Rebekah into his mother's tent, and she became his wife
His mother said unto him, Upon me be thy curse, my son

characters.name: Rachel
characters.description: Beloved wife of Jacob

appearances.text: Rachel was beautiful and well favoured
Rachel died, and was buried in the way to Bethlehem

characters.name: Leah
characters.description: First wife of Jacob

appearances.text: He took Leah his daughter, and brought her to Jacob
She conceived again, and bare a son: and she called his name Judah

characters.name: Aaron
characters.description: Brother of Moses, first high priest

appearances.text: Is not Aaron the Levite thy brother?
Take thou unto thee Aaron thy brother, that he may minister unto me

characters.name: Miriam
characters.description: Prophetess, sister of Moses and Aaron
facts: Led women in song after Red Sea

appearances.text: Miriam the prophetess took a timbrel in her hand
Miriam became leprous, white as snow

characters.name: Caleb
characters.description: Faithful spy who entered Promised Land

appearances.text: Caleb stilled the people, Let us go up at once
Hebron therefore became the inheritance of Caleb

characters.name: Boaz
characters.description: Kinsman-redeemer who married Ruth

appearances.text: Naomi had a kinsman, a mighty man of wealth, named Boaz
Boaz took Ruth, and she was his wife

characters.name: King Nebuchadnezzar
characters.description: Babylonian king who conquered Jerusalem

appearances.text: Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came against Jerusalem
The same hour was Nebuchadnezzar driven from men

characters.name: Cyrus
characters.description: Persian king who freed Jews from exile

appearances.text: The LORD stirred up the spirit of Cyrus king of Persia
Thus saith the LORD to his anointed, to Cyrus

characters.name: Matthew
characters.description: Tax collector turned apostle, Gospel writer

appearances.text: Jesus saw a man, named Matthew, sitting at the receipt of custom
Thomas, and Matthew the publican

characters.name: Mark
characters.description: Author of the second Gospel

appearances.text: They took with them John, whose surname was Mark
Marcus my son saluteth you

characters.name: Luke
characters.description: Physician and Gospel writer

appearances.text: Luke, the beloved physician
Only Luke is with me

characters.name: James
characters.description: Brother of John, first apostle martyred

appearances.text: He saw James the son of Zebedee, and John his brother
Herod killed James the brother of John with the sword

characters.name: Andrew
characters.description: Apostle who brought Peter to Jesus

appearances.text: One of the two which heard John speak was Andrew
Andrew, Simon Peter's brother, saith unto him

characters.name: Philip
characters.description: Apostle who brought Nathanael to Jesus

appearances.text: Jesus findeth Philip, and saith unto him, Follow me
Philip saith unto him, Lord, shew us the Father

characters.name: Thomas
characters.description: Apostle known as 'Doubting Thomas'

appearances.text: Thomas, called Didymus, said, Let us also go, that we may die with him
Thomas answered and said unto him, My Lord and my God

characters.name: Bartholomew
characters.description: Apostle also known as Nathanael
facts: Recognized Jesus as Son of God

appearances.text: Philip, and Bartholomew
Jesus saw Nathanael, Behold an Israelite indeed

characters.name: Judas Iscariot
characters.description: Apostle who betrayed Jesus

appearances.text: Judas Iscariot, went unto the chief priests
He cast down the pieces of silver and went and hanged himself

characters.name: Barnabas
characters.description: Encourager and missionary companion of Paul

appearances.text: Joses, who by the apostles was surnamed Barnabas, (which is, The son of consolation)
Separate me Barnabas and Saul for the work

characters.name: Stephen
characters.description: First Christian martyr

appearances.text: They chose Stephen, a man full of faith and of the Holy Ghost
They stoned Stephen, calling upon God

characters.name: Timothy
characters.description: Young pastor mentored by Paul

appearances.text: A certain disciple was there, named Timotheus
Unto Timothy, my own son in the faith

characters.name: Titus
characters.description: Pastor and companion of Paul

appearances.text: God comforted us by the coming of Titus
To Titus, mine own son after the common faith

characters.name: Silas
characters.description: Prophet and Paul's missionary companion

appearances.text: Judas surnamed Barsabas, and Silas, chief men among the brethren
At midnight Paul and Silas prayed, and sang praises

characters.name: Lydia
characters.description: First European convert to Christianity

appearances.text: A certain woman named Lydia, a seller of purple
When she was baptized, she besought us

characters.name: Priscilla
characters.description: Teacher and tentmaker with Aquila

appearances.text: Aquila, with his wife Priscilla
Priscilla and Aquila expounded unto him the way of God

characters.name: Aquila
characters.description: Tentmaker and teacher with Priscilla

appearances.text: A certain Jew named Aquila
Greet Priscilla and Aquila my helpers in Christ Jesus

characters.name: Mary Magdalene
characters.description: Follower of Jesus, first to see risen Christ

appearances.text: Mary called Magdalene, out of whom went seven devils
Jesus saith unto her, Mary

characters.name: Martha
characters.description: Sister of Mary and Lazarus

appearances.text: A certain woman named Martha received him into her house
She saith unto him, Yea, Lord: I believe that thou art the Christ

characters.name: Lazarus
characters.description: Friend of Jesus who was raised from the dead

appearances.text: A certain man was sick, named Lazarus, of Bethany
He cried with a loud voice, Lazarus, come forth

characters.name: Nicodemus
characters.description: Pharisee who visited Jesus at night

appearances.text: There was a man of the Pharisees, named Nicodemus
Nicodemus came, bringing a mixture of myrrh and aloes

characters.name: Zacchaeus
characters.description: Tax collector who climbed tree to see Jesus

appearances.text: Behold, there was a man named Zacchaeus, which was the chief among the publicans
Zacchaeus stood, and said, I give half of my goods to the poor

characters.name: Joseph of Arimathea
characters.description: Secret disciple who buried Jesus

appearances.text: Joseph of Arimathea, an honourable counsellor
Joseph of Arimathea besought Pilate that he might take away the body of Jesus

characters.name: John the Baptist
characters.description: Prophet who prepared the way for Jesus

appearances.text: In those days came John the Baptist
He sent, and beheaded John in the prison

characters.name: Elizabeth
characters.description: Mother of John the Baptist

appearances.text: His wife was of the daughters of Aaron, and her name was Elisabeth
Elisabeth was filled with the Holy Ghost

characters.name: Zacharias
characters.description: Priest and father of John the Baptist

appearances.text: There was a certain priest named Zacharias
Thou shalt be dumb, because thou believest not my words

characters.name: Pontius Pilate
characters.description: Roman governor who condemned Jesus

appearances.text: They delivered him to Pontius Pilate the governor
Pilate took water, and washed his hands

characters.name: Herod
characters.description: King who killed babies seeking Jesus

appearances.text: When Jesus was born in Bethlehem in the days of Herod the king
Herod sent forth, and slew all the children

characters.name: Melchizedek
characters.description: Mysterious priest-king who blessed Abraham

appearances.text: Melchizedek king of Salem brought forth bread and wine
This Melchisedec, king of Salem, priest of the most high God

characters.name: Mordecai
characters.description: Uncle of Esther who saved the Jews

appearances.text: There was a certain Jew, whose name was Mordecai
Mordecai the Jew was next unto king Ahasuerus

characters.name: Haman
characters.description: Enemy of the Jews in Persia

appearances.text: King Ahasuerus promoted Haman
They hanged Haman on the gallows

characters.name: Shadrach
characters.description: One of three men thrown in fiery furnace

appearances.text: He gave unto Hananiah, the name of Shadrach
Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego, came forth of the midst of the fire

characters.name: Meshach
characters.description: Companion of Daniel in Babylon

appearances.text: Of Mishael, Meshach
Blessed be the God of Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego

characters.name: Abednego
characters.description: Third man in fiery furnace

appearances.text: Of Azariah, Abednego
The king promoted Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego

characters.name: Amos
characters.description: Prophet and shepherd from Tekoa

appearances.text: The words of Amos, who was among the herdmen of Tekoa
I was no prophet, neither was I a prophet's son; but I was an herdman

characters.name: Hosea
characters.description: Prophet who married an unfaithful woman

appearances.text: The LORD said to Hosea, Go, take unto thee a wife of whoredoms
Go yet, love a woman beloved of her friend

characters.name: Micah
characters.description: Prophet who foretold Messiah's birthplace

appearances.text: The word of the LORD that came to Micah
But thou, Bethlehem Ephratah, out of thee shall he come forth

characters.name: Habakkuk
characters.description: Prophet who questioned God
facts: The just shall live by faith

appearances.text: The burden which Habakkuk the prophet did see
The just shall live by his faith

characters.name: Haggai
characters.description: Prophet who urged temple rebuilding

appearances.text: Came the word of the LORD by Haggai the prophet
Be strong, and work: for I am with you

characters.name: Zechariah
characters.description: Prophet of restoration and Messiah

appearances.text: Came the word of the LORD unto Zechariah
Behold, thy King cometh unto thee, lowly, and riding upon an ass

characters.name: Malachi
characters.description: Last prophet of Old Testament

appearances.text: The burden of the word of the LORD to Israel by Malachi
Behold, I will send you Elijah the prophet

characters.name: Simeon
characters.description: Righteous man who blessed baby Jesus

appearances.text: There was a man in Jerusalem, whose name was Simeon
Lord, now lettest thou thy servant depart in peace

characters.name: Anna
characters.description: Prophetess who recognized baby Jesus

appearances.text: There was one Anna, a prophetess
She gave thanks likewise unto the Lord
